description_long: This object is a toroidal donut with a visually striking half-and-half design. One side is coated in a glossy chocolate glaze, generously sprinkled with colorful confetti-like sprinkles in pastel shades of pink, green, and white. The other half is plain, showing a golden-brown, slightly textured baked dough surface. The donut's surface is soft and slightly uneven, with gentle indentations and a realistic bread-like appearance. The chocolate glaze appears thick and smooth, contrasting with the matte, porous look of the unglazed dough. The overall form is plump and inviting, with a central hole typical of classic donuts.
description: A half-chocolate-glazed donut with colorful sprinkles on one side and plain golden-brown dough on the other, featuring a soft, realistic texture.
description_view_0: The donut is seen from an angle that clearly shows the division between the chocolate-glazed, sprinkle-covered side and the plain dough side.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the plain dough side, with the chocolate glaze and sprinkles visible only on the upper edge.
description_view_2: The plain dough side is most prominent, with the chocolate-glazed, sprinkled half receding into the background.
description_view_3: The chocolate-glazed side with sprinkles dominates the foreground, while the plain dough is visible in the background.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze, glossy and thick, covering half the donut
attribute_topping_type: colorful sugar sprinkles (pink, green, white) on the chocolate-glazed half
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped, with no visible surface or container
